name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: BIG surprise for Melania 💝
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
The President has asked for your help... |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=62266ba47b0b18f6bbbc0ee401422ad0c3d43d465536ab7ac55792c61f8dbdaa26a575570de3b1b00cae92c427b260dae8534e7534bd0af8)
---

Friend,

_President Trump and First Lady Melania are about to celebrate their 14th wedding anniversary on January 22nd ..._

This is President Trump's favorite day of the year, so he always wants to make sure Melania is surprised with an EPIC Anniversary card.

And as one of our top supporters, we wanted to give you the chance to be the FIRST to sign the official card to celebrate their special day.

**[Please sign President Trump's & First Lady Melania's Official Anniversary Card in the NEXT 3 HOURS to be one of the first to sign the card.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=62266ba47b0b18f6951387ec5a6c5a17b9014883b265049570c5532ee854e248f7b8c9005509b1c230f15c3fdbdea6b59aec8008aa6eb4f2)**
| **[PRESIDENT TRUMP'S& FIRST LADY MELANIA'S OFFICIAL ANNIVERSARY CARD](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=62266ba47b0b18f683a42d43e3f78d08bac9042160bcaf23ab898f3c3331692533cfe40ff7406f7046d0c4ecafaac9eba9f740e7d8c05e1f)** Mr. President and First Lady,
********[** Enter your personal message here... **](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=62266ba47b0b18f68b3f3797629bbf7c5a56eddcef4a2282a65235177d9e76ce6575ed94040cde0b7b8d1196a095ab39b7c6d526e3aa85bd)******** Sincerely,

An American Patriot
******[ **✉ SIGN THE CARD ✉**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=62266ba47b0b18f68b3f3797629bbf7c5a56eddcef4a2282a65235177d9e76ce6575ed94040cde0b7b8d1196a095ab39b7c6d526e3aa85bd)******
---
Last year, President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump were both so happy to see all of the beautiful and thoughtful messages from Americans.

Don't miss out on this unique opportunity to be one of the FIRST to sign their Official Anniversary Card.

**[Please sign the President Trump's & First Lady Melania's Official Anniversary Card in the NEXT 3 HOURS to be one of the first to sign the card.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=62266ba47b0b18f6a6952374fa85e96b8f575eebb63e8d5f04a459791c87e4bfa015e038cbe6be8d2fc22b7c5f453279950f664da4643eea)**

Thank you,

Team TRUMP [✉ SIGN THE CARD ✉](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=62266ba47b0b18f637131fdeb13743d44149c2385ea686c0ff06d885565ca9849f28f5865c0ef4797784574287eaf90afe731ddc5d8cd194)

It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

name: Dan Lipinski (personal)
subject: reaching out one more time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for CongressContributions or gifts to Dan Lipinski for Congress are not tax deductible
body:
Hi Peter,
I’m sorry to bother you on a Saturday, but this urgently needs your attention.
I’ve cosponsored bipartisan legislation to finally enact universal background checks on all gun sales. An overwhelming majority of Americans support this proposal.
Help us push it through Congress and get it signed into law. Add your name to the list of supporters now → [http://petitions.signforgood.com/SupportFederalBackgroundChecks/?code=lipinski&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdl-backgroundchecks-ja-up%3Famount%3D10.00%26recurring%3Dtrue]
Thanks,
Dan
Paid for by Dan Lipinski for CongressContributions or gifts to Dan Lipinski for Congress are not tax deductible.
Unsubscribe Now [http://https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e9142c41-5a1b-e911-9f2a-281878391efb/25455cbd-0b1c-e911-9f2a-281878391efb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTQ1NWNiZC0wYjFjLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1wM1ejCFR43C_WC2ziAY2W5vX8vUBAUZLRop3TWR9is=&id=103593688&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com]

Western Springs, IL 60558
United States

name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: Send a BRICK
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
to Chuck and Nancy. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=6afb78803e8387439976109c1e66ff98c27eaba7f2b0291cf41b65bbf1849dd3c7e1f288ad5b35ba354a3f9033ebecedfa29e567d10d1fea)
---

Friend,

Since the shutdown began, we have sent MILLIONS of your Build The Wall petition signatures to Chuck & Nancy and showed them every poll proving Americans not only want the wall, they _DEMAND THE WALL._

Sadly, they act like you don't even EXIST, Friend. They forgot about the Hard-Working American a long time ago, and only listen to Liberal Mega-Donors and Hollywood Elites.

That's why President Trump came up with a brilliant idea to make sure Chuck and Nancy have no choice but to listen to you, Friend.

**For every $20.20 dollars raised by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT, we will send a BEAUTIFUL BRICK directly to the offices of Chuck Schumer or Nancy Pelosi.**

Each brick will be etched with facts about border security to remind Democrats why WE NEED THE WALL.

Together, we can build a BIG BEAUTIFUL WALL around their offices to protect us from their radical left-wing agenda.
[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=6afb78803e83874397f50a10ce5dc718d792dc06aaa686121020a77c4a47e94323db6e92c43c1c7294ea7d69bda822ccb37edc7649c84d9d)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Falling short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
|
---
[]()
| | | Team,

When I took office two years ago, I knew we had to get to work immediately to get our state back on track. And because of your support, we've been able to make a real difference in people's lives.

We recruited thousands of new jobs, made meaningful investments in public education, **and we broke up the Republican super-majorities in both the House and the Senate.**

**There 's more work to do, but we're still fighting against a Republican-led legislature that wants to hold our progress back. We need to keep moving forward, but to do that I need your help.**

Right now we're falling short of our January fundraising goal for our campaign. If that happens, we won't have the resources to respond to GOP attacks, and that could wipe out our momentum. [_**We need 278 supporters to chip in $10 or more before midnight Sunday to get back on budget, can I count on you to be one of them?**_](http://act.roycooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-january2019-midmonth?refcode=011919&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Rocky Point&state=NC&zip=28457&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you'll be taken to a donation page:_

**[Chip in $10->](http://act.roycooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-january2019-midmonth?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcdoe=011919&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Rocky Point&state=NC&zip=28457&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

**[Chip in $25->](http://act.roycooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-january2019-midmonth?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcdoe=011919&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Rocky Point&state=NC&zip=28457&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

**[Chip in $50->](http://act.roycooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-january2019-midmonth?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcdoe=011919&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Rocky Point&state=NC&zip=28457&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

**[Chip in $100->](http://act.roycooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-january2019-midmonth?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcdoe=011919&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Rocky Point&state=NC&zip=28457&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

**[Chip in another amount->](http://act.roycooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-january2019-midmonth?refcode=011919&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Rocky Point&state=NC&zip=28457&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
Your help in moving North Carolina forward is critical. Together we have a real chance to help hundreds of thousands of North Carolinians access quality health care by expanding Medicaid.

We want to stamp out the GOP's legacy of gerrymandering, and continue to fight against their unprecedented power-grabs.

Progress won't be easy, but with your help, we can continue moving North Carolina forward.

_**[Please, help us reach our goal before midnight Sunday. Only 278 donations from supporters like you will get us back on track. Will you be one of them?](http://act.roycooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-january2019-midmonth?refcode=011919&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Rocky Point&state=NC&zip=28457&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Thanks,

Roy
---

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Nine years ago
body:
Join me in supporting a constitutional amendment to end Citizens United.
|
---

| | Peter, Nine years ago this month, the Supreme Court decided _Citizens United v. FEC_. Their ruling unleashed devastating amounts of special interest spending directly into American elections. Special interest groups have taken full advantage -- investing over a billion dollars in making elections more about who has the most money and less about which side has the best ideas. The needs of the corporations and billionaires funding these efforts have now taken center stage in Washington while the needs of the people who make this country work are ignored. **Nine years of _Citizens United_ is nine years too many.** [**I'm teaming up with _End Citizens United_ to gather grassroots momentum in favor of a constitutional amendment to end _Citizens United_ \-- and I'm asking you to join us Peter.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffde5/4462dc26/883093e0/201ee595/2424320204/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/ja190119m") | | | [Sign the Petition](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffde5/4462dc26/883093e0/201ee595/2424320204/VEsE/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/ja190119m")
---
When billionaires and corporations spend millions to elect candidates, they gain an audience they can pressure to vote how they want -- like pass huge tax breaks for the super-rich and corporations. Part of the reason so many lawmakers in Washington don't understand or respect the dignity of work is because their campaigns are bought and paid for by special interests.
But American workers who punch a clock need leaders who will ensure they have safe working conditions, Social Security, and access to healthcare in case they get injured. People who swipe a badge need leaders who will protect their economic security, fight discrimination, and make sure the minimum wage is also a living wage. There is dignity in all work, and all workers should be heard and respected in Washington.
We can take back our democracy from powerful interest groups and corporations if we can **get their money out of our elections.** Overturning _Citizens United_ is the best way to get that done.
**The only way that will happen is if we build a movement so powerful, Republicans in Congress can't continue to ignore us.**
[**Join the movement today. Add your name to the petition >>**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffde5/4462dc26/883093e0/201ee595/2424320204/VEsF/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/ja190119m")
WIth gratitude,
Sherrod

|
---
[www.sherrodbrown.com](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffde5/4462dc26/883093e0/201ee594/2424320204/VEsC/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/")
| | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
---
